summary: Added SELF-MODEL v1 first slice. Introduced mechanism-honest self-model schema, CAP/GAP/VERIFY artifact families, validation and audit logic, writer scripts, CAP-0001 for explicit L0 latest-context inclusion, GAP-0001 for automatic L0 discovery, VERIFY-20260705-0001 for test evidence, and seven focused self-model tests. Full suite passed with 276 tests before commit.
